items.name: Breakfast Burrito
items.description: Greek styled omelette, bacon, cheese, roasted capsicum, hash brown, spinach and onion BBQ sauce.

items.name: Breakfast Burger
items.description: Toasted roll topped with beef patty, bacon, cheddar cheese, egg and BBQ sauce.

items.name: Breakfast Deluxe
items.description: Eggs your way, slow cooked beans, bacon, chicken chippo, grilled mushrooms, hash brown, grilled tomato and crusty Italian bread.

items.name: Smash the Day Avocado
items.description: Smashed avo topped with crumbed greek feta and drizzled with balsamic vinaigrette on crusty Italian bread.

items.name: Fluffy Pancakes (3)
items.description: Fluffy pancakes with seasonal fruits, whipped cream and maple syrup drizzle.

items.name: Savoury French Toast
items.description: Topped with bacon, rocket, sliced avocado and drizzled balsamic.

items.name: Eggs Benedict
items.description: Poached eggs, rocket and bacon on ciabatta bread with hollandaise sauce.

items.name: Egg and Bacon Toastie
items.description: Toasted sandwich with egg and bacon.

items.name: Ham and Cheese Toastie
items.description: Classic ham and cheese toasted sandwich.

items.name: Ham and Cheese Croissant
items.description: Buttery croissant filled with ham and cheese.

items.name: White Chocolate and Raspberry Muffin
items.description: Moist muffin with white chocolate and raspberry.
